title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!
